FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Release
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Just a version bump for the official workshop release.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Event Cost Tweaks
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Changes the cost scaling for a couple of event options

patchNoteLines.li: Changes the cost scaling for certain options for events Persona Core Discovery, Cybernetic Enhancement Program, Master Weaponsmith, and Wandering Healer

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Odyssey-less Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Gate references to orbital settlements behind a MayRequire check for Odyssey to get rid of startup config errors.

patchNoteLines.li: Update Chemfuel Spill and Chemfuel Geyser event xml to gate references to orbital settlements behind a MayRequire check for Odyssey

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Tribute Demand bugfix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Fixes a bug with the Tribute Demand event.

patchNoteLines.li: Bugfix: when looking for a hostile faction for Tribute Demand, a faulty check allowed Empire settlements to check and select themselves
